title: Vegetarian Mac and Cheese
description: A comforting, creamy, and easy-to-make vegetarian macaroni and cheese recipe. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cook the macaroni according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a large saucepan, melt the vegetarian butter or margarine over medium heat.
Add the all-purpose flour and whisk together to make a roux, cooking for 1-2 minutes.
Slowly add in the condensed cream of mushroom soup and comforting chicken broth, whisking constantly.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, until it thickens.
Stir in the vegetarian cheese blend until melted and smooth.
Add the cooked macaroni to the cheese sauce and stir until well combined.
Transfer the macaroni and cheese to a baking dish and top with additional grated cheese if desired.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, until the top is golden brown and the macaroni and cheese is heated through.
Garnish with cured parsley and serve hot.
